source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 致敬英雄 接续奋斗
topics.why_hot: National sentiment and collective memory, likely related to a commemorative event or anniversary.
topics.share_angle: Explain the significance of this memorial day and how it inspires national unity and progress.

topics.chinese_topic: 二手豪车大降价 车商：同行改干烧烤
topics.why_hot: Reflects economic downturn and changing consumer behavior; luxury car market slump.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the economic signals behind luxury car price drops and what it means for the broader economy.

topics.chinese_topic: 比利时内讧时对手都来劝架了
topics.why_hot: World Cup drama; internal conflict within Belgian team during match, unusual sportsmanship.
topics.share_angle: Highlight the sportsmanship and the lighter side of World Cup tensions.

topics.chinese_topic: 中国经济驰而不息的底气所在
topics.why_hot: Official narrative on economic resilience; public interest in economic outlook.
topics.share_angle: Break down the key factors underpinning China's economic resilience.

topics.chinese_topic: 清华门前一张父女合影里彩蛋藏了17年
topics.why_hot: Heartwarming human-interest story; hidden detail in old photo goes viral.
topics.share_angle: Tell the story of the photo and the 'Easter egg' that was discovered 17 years later.

topics.chinese_topic: 泰山景区回应修建刀片刺绳隔离网
topics.why_hot: Public concern over safety measures at famous scenic spot; tourism and environment.
topics.share_angle: Explain the rationale behind the installation and the public reaction.

topics.chinese_topic: 世界杯三个东道主全部晋级16强
topics.why_hot: World Cup milestone; all three host nations advance, a rare feat.
topics.share_angle: Analyze the performance of the host nations and the significance of this achievement.

topics.chinese_topic: 日本市民大排长龙买中国相机
topics.why_hot: Chinese products gaining popularity abroad; tech and trade interest.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the rise of Chinese camera brands in the Japanese market and what it says about global tech trends.
